code: export const initCustomCursor=()=>{const cursor=document.getElementById('custom-cursor');let mouseX=0;let mouseY=0;let cursorX=0;let cursorY=0;const speed=0.76;const updatePosition=e=>{mouseX=e.clientX;mouseY=e.clientY;};const animateCursor=()=>{const distX=mouseX-cursorX;const distY=mouseY-cursorY;cursorX=cursorX+distX*speed;cursorY=cursorY+distY*speed;if(cursor){cursor.style.left=`${cursorX}px`;cursor.style.top=`${cursorY}px`;}requestAnimationFrame(animateCursor);};const handleMouseEnter=()=>{cursor.classList.add('cursor-active');cursor.style.transform='translate(-50%, -50%) scale(2.5)';cursor.style.backgroundColor='rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.15)';cursor.style.borderColor='rgba(6, 182, 212, 1)';};const handleMouseLeave=()=>{cursor.classList.remove('cursor-active');cursor.style.transform='translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1)';cursor.style.backgroundColor='transparent';cursor.style.borderColor='#06b6d4';};window.addEventListener('mousemove',updatePosition);const interactiveElements=document.querySelectorAll('button, a, .glass-card, input, textarea');interactiveElements.forEach(el=>{el.addEventListener('mouseenter',handleMouseEnter);el.addEventListener('mouseleave',handleMouseLeave);});requestAnimationFrame(animateCursor);};
